title: Toyrific 99 cm Hobby Horse Toy with Sounds, Strong Grip Handles and Wheels, Dark Brown
features: COMPLETE HOBBY HORSE TOY: perfect first hobby horse for all young equine enthusiasts, let their imagination come to life and play horse riding games
DURABLE: the toy is durable and sturdy, the wooden wheels makes it more comfortable for kids to move and trot around. The head of the horse is soft material to keep kids safe whilst playing
INTERACTIVE FEATURES: Press the ear to hear realistic neigh and gallop sounds, brown reins also add to the realism. Follow label instructions to activate sounds.
SKILL BUILDING: this toy is perfect for kids to use their imagination through role-plays it will get the kids active and think creatively about their next steps of play
IDEAL GIFT: Toyrific toys come in fun engaging packaging it is perfect present for all kids. Ideal for kids who want to learn role-play based experiences. Ages 2+
